accurate.why: The claims present (removal directive, notification dates) are consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims appear in the truncated summary.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly states the bill directs removal of US forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The summary references the War Powers Resolution but is cut off mid-sentence and never describes the bill's use of expedited procedures or the legal mechanism invoked.

exceptions_conditions.why: The summary omits the material rule-of-construction carve-outs (self-defense, intelligence sharing, assisting Israel, evacuating citizens).

effective_dates.why: The summary fails to convey the 60-day War Powers deadline (ending May 1, 2026) as the sentence is truncated.

major_provisions_covered.why: The summary cuts off mid-sentence and misses the core operative directive details and exceptions, leaving major provisions uncovered.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and non-partisan.

coherent.why: The summary ends abruptly mid-sentence ('Under the War Powers Resolution,'), making it incomplete and not internally coherent.

concise.why: The text is free of padding and filler.

correct_entities.why: Named entities (Iran, War Powers Resolution, President, Congress) are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The dates stated (March 2, 2026 and February 28, 2026) match the bill text.
